message:
Fix carousel index out-of-bounds bug in endorsement showcase

When filters change and the filtered array shrinks, the carousel index
could remain pointing beyond the new array length, causing undefined
access and incorrect counter display (e.g., "5 of 3").

Fixed by computing a safe carousel index via useMemo that clamps to
valid bounds at render time, avoiding cascading setState calls in
useEffect.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
